name: Win-Back Campaign
description: Re-engage lapsed customers with emails and SMS over 30 days

steps.subject: We miss you, {{first_name}}!
steps.body_html:
We Miss You!

Hi {{first_name}}, it's been a while since your last visit. We've been busy adding new products and making things even better.

Come check out what's new!
steps.body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, we miss you! Come see what's new.

steps.subject: A special offer just for you, {{first_name}}
steps.body_html:
Welcome Back Offer

Hi {{first_name}}, we'd love to welcome you back with a special 15% discount on your next order.

Use code: MISSYOU15
steps.body_text: Hi {{first_name}}, here's 15% off with code MISSYOU15.

steps.sms_body: Hi {{first_name}}, your 15% discount (MISSYOU15) is expiring soon! Shop now before it's gone. Reply STOP to opt out.
